scenes.description: La+ Darknesss performs 'Kyouminai yo' (I'm Not Interested) on stage.
Scene transition with stage lighting and effects.
Kazama Iroha performs 'Honto no Watashi' (The Real Me) on stage.
scenes.song_name: ホントノワタシ (Honto no Watashi)

subtitles.original: 「私を何で好きなんだって」
subtitles.english: Asking me, "Why do you like me?"

subtitles.original: 問い出す流れ
subtitles.english: Is just the flow of our conversation

subtitles.original: 最低な私、
subtitles.english: I'm the worst,

subtitles.original: あの子の方がいいんだもんね
subtitles.english: that girl is better for you, right?

subtitles.original: 私興味ないよ、君なんて
subtitles.english: I'm not interested in someone like you

subtitles.original: マジ半端ないね、舐めた真似
subtitles.english: Seriously, you're unbelievable, acting so cocky

subtitles.original: 僕的宇宙なこの愛に
subtitles.english: In this love of mine, a personal universe,

subtitles.original: 壊されないで、愛
subtitles.english: Don't be broken, my love

subtitles.original: 壊されないで、愛
subtitles.english: Don't be broken, my love

subtitles.original: 止めどないよ 君の愛を 独り占めしたい
subtitles.english: It's unstoppable, I want your love all to myself

subtitles.original: 特異だろうが何だろうが 抱きしめてあげたい
subtitles.english: Whether it's strange or whatever, I want to hold you tight

subtitles.original: ライセンス契約 独占のポリラブ
subtitles.english: A license agreement for an exclusive poly-love

subtitles.original: 逃がさない、ずっと
subtitles.english: I won't let you get away, ever

subtitles.original: 君が好きって この感情に
subtitles.english: The feeling of "I like you"—

subtitles.original: 騙されてる
subtitles.english: I'm being deceived by it

subtitles.original: 大事な方は君か私か
subtitles.english: Whether you or I am more important,

subtitles.original: 決めかねてる
subtitles.english: I can't decide

subtitles.original: 甘すぎる君を
subtitles.english: You, who are just too sweet

subtitles.original: 私興味ないよ、君なんて
subtitles.english: I'm not interested in someone like you

subtitles.original: ほら振り回して、好きなだけ
subtitles.english: See? Toy with me as much as you like

subtitles.original: 僕的宇宙なこの愛を
subtitles.english: Because I won't hand over this love of mine,

subtitles.original: 渡さないから
subtitles.english: a personal universe

subtitles.original: 馬鹿だよね、色ボケだね
subtitles.english: You're a fool, blinded by love

subtitles.original: それ見たことか、ダサすぎか
subtitles.english: See? I told you so. Or are you just too uncool?

subtitles.original: もう他でもない、あなたに呪われたまま
subtitles.english: It's none other than you who has cursed me like this

subtitles.original: 私興味ないよ、君なんて
subtitles.english: I'm not interested in someone like you

subtitles.original: 馬鹿なふりして、あげただけ
subtitles.english: I was only pretending to be a fool for you

subtitles.original: 愛と愛をぶつけ合って
subtitles.english: Clashing our loves against each other

subtitles.original: ぐちゃぐちゃになって
subtitles.english: Becoming a complete mess

subtitles.original: 私興味ないよ、君なんて
subtitles.english: I'm not interested in someone like you

subtitles.original: マジ半端ないね、舐めた真似
subtitles.english: Seriously, you're unbelievable, acting so cocky

subtitles.original: 僕的宇宙なこの愛に
subtitles.english: In this love of mine, a personal universe,

subtitles.original: 壊されないで、愛
subtitles.english: Don't be broken, my love

subtitles.original: 壊されないで、愛
subtitles.english: Don't be broken, my love

subtitles.original: 見た目だけで終わらせない
subtitles.english: Don't just judge me by my appearance

subtitles.original: 私のこと「可愛い」だけと
subtitles.english: You don't just think I'm "cute,"

subtitles.original: まさか思っていないよね
subtitles.english: do you?

subtitles.original: 私のホント知っていてほしい
subtitles.english: I want you to know the real me

subtitles.original: ホントノワタシ
subtitles.english: The Real Me

subtitles.original: 予測誤差の範囲内
subtitles.english: Within the margin of prediction error

subtitles.original: 不測事態も動じない
subtitles.english: Unshaken even by unexpected situations

subtitles.original: オスマシ顔でいるけど
subtitles.english: I keep a composed face, but...

subtitles.original: 心は常に蒼白く燃え
subtitles.english: My heart is always burning with a pale blue flame

subtitles.original: 諦めはしない 媚びたりもしない
subtitles.english: I won't give up, I won't flatter anyone

subtitles.original: 私、負けない
subtitles.english: I will not lose

subtitles.original: 扱いやっかい奴等の伴
subtitles.english: A friend to those hard-to-handle guys

subtitles.original: 甘く見ると 痛い目見るぞ
subtitles.english: Underestimate me and you'll regret it

subtitles.original: それでも時に逃げ出してしまいたい
subtitles.english: Still, sometimes I just want to run away

subtitles.original: そんな衝動に
subtitles.english: Caught in that impulse,

subtitles.original: 弱音吐き出したくなる夜もある
subtitles.english: there are nights I want to whine

subtitles.original: ほんの小さな 小さな妥協が
subtitles.english: Just a tiny, tiny compromise

subtitles.original: 積み重なり 重なって 動けない
subtitles.english: Piles up and up until I can't move

subtitles.original: 大きな大きな可能性を背負い
subtitles.english: Carrying big, big possibilities

subtitles.original: 未来を狭めてしまうから
subtitles.english: might narrow my future

subtitles.original: どんなに苦しくても 辛くても
subtitles.english: No matter how painful or hard it gets,

subtitles.original: 後悔だけはしない
subtitles.english: I won't have any regrets

subtitles.original: 往き方の模範じゃなくて
subtitles.english: It's not a model of how to go,

subtitles.original: 「生き方」なんだ
subtitles.english: it's my "way of life"

subtitles.original: 現実と理想の距離を縮められたとしても
subtitles.english: Even if the distance between reality and ideals could be closed

subtitles.original: オスマシ顔でいるだけ
subtitles.english: I'll just keep a composed face,

subtitles.original: 何事もなかったかのように
subtitles.english: as if nothing happened

subtitles.original: 立ち止まりはしない
subtitles.english: I won't stop,

subtitles.original: 後戻りもしない
subtitles.english: I won't turn back,

subtitles.original: 夢も捨てない
subtitles.english: and I won't throw away my dreams
